description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the jnijhof/kitchen-docker Docker image and two stages: test and publish. In the test stage add an "openvpn ubuntu 16.04" job that runs the exact command "kitchen test default-ubuntu-1604", and an "rspec" job that runs "rspec -f d". In the publish stage add a "push-cookbook" job that only runs on the master branch when the variables OPS_CLONE_USERNAME and OPS_CLONE_PASSWORD are defined; it clones the repository https://$OPS_CLONE_USERNAME:$OPS_CLONE_PASSWORD@ops.gitlab.net/gitlab-cookbooks/cookbook-publisher.git into /tmp/cookbook-publisher, copies /tmp/cookbook-publisher/publisher.rb to the current directory, and executes it with "ruby publisher.rb". No caches, artifacts, services, or deployment targets are configured.
